title: Join the waitlist
subtitle: Be first in when Season 1 opens. No spam — just your invite.

help.name: Only used to personalize your invite.
help.email: Where we'll send your Season 1 invite. Must be unique.
help.nickname: Your public handle on the leaderboard — others use it to refer you. Leave blank and we'll generate one. Must be unique.
help.referred: The nickname of whoever invited you, so they get the credit.
help.avatar: Pick the character you'll play as.

success: You're on the list — we'll be in touch.

errors.name: Please enter your name.
errors.emailTaken: That email is already on the list.
errors.nicknameTaken: That nickname is taken — try another.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
